mapper.sql: a.id, a.accid, a.status, a.pay_time as payTime, a.create_time as createTime, b.response_info as responseInfo, b.sub_code as subCode, b.sub_msg as subMsg, b.out_biz_no as outBizNo, b.prize_amount as prizeAmount, b.alipay_account as alipayAccount

a.id, a.accid, a.status, a.pay_time as payTime, a.create_time as createTime, b.response_info as responseInfo, b.sub_code as subCode, b.sub_msg as subMsg, b.out_biz_no as outBizNo, b.prize_amount as prizeAmount
a.id, a.accid, a.status, a.pay_time as payTime, a.create_time as createTime,d.alipay_account as alipayAccount
mapper.select:
select
from biz_alipay_bill a inner join biz_accident c on a.accid = c.id inner join biz_wx_user d on c.openid = d.openid WHERE a.status = #{status}

select
from biz_accident d inner join biz_alipay_bill a on d.id = a.accid and a.status = 0 inner join biz_alipay_pay_record b on a.id = b.bill_id WHERE d.openid = #{openid} ORDER BY a.pay_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_alipay_bill(accid, status, pay_time, create_time) values (#{bizAlipayBill.accid},#{bizAlipayBill.status},#{bizAlipayBill.payTime},#{bizAlipayBill.createTime})
